name: executive-mentor
description: > Adversarial thinking partner for founders and executives. Stress-tests plans, prepares for board meetings, dissects decisions with no good options, forces honest post-mortems, and identifies blind spots before competitors or board members do. Use when you need plan validation, board preparation, hard decision frameworks, assumption stress-testing, failure analysis, or when user mentions stress test, challenge, board prep, hard decision, pre-mortem, post-mortem, devil's advocate, plan review, o
author: borghei
